summary: Tested new homepage sections and admin whitepaper URL feature. All features working correctly. Backend 100% (9/9 tests). Frontend 100% - all new sections render, whitepaper button shows/hides based on URL config.
passed_tests: Homepage 'PIO – Gold-Backed Native Coin' section renders correctly
Homepage 'What Problem Does PIO Solve?' section renders correctly
Homepage 'Why Is PIO Different?' section renders correctly
View Whitepaper button appears on homepage when URL is configured
View Whitepaper button is hidden when URL is empty
Admin login works with credentials admin/adminpassword
Admin Settings tab shows Website Settings card
Whitepaper URL input field is present in admin dashboard
seed_data_creation: Whitepaper URL set to https://piogold.com/whitepaper.pdf for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested: Homepage new sections (PIO Gold-Backed Native Coin, What Problem Does PIO Solve, Why Is PIO Different) render correctly. Admin dashboard Website Settings card with whitepaper_url input working. Whitepaper button on homepage conditionally shows based on URL configuration.
